category_sources: Official tmuxai.dev homepage describes TmuxAI as an AI-powered non-intrusive terminal assistant.
source_facts.description says tmuxai is an AI-powered, non-intrusive terminal assistant.
display_name_sources: Official tmuxai.dev homepage brands the project as TmuxAI.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to the GitHub repository; repository README is the source documentation fallback.
source_facts.homepage points to the official tmuxai.dev site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/BoringDystopiaDevelopment/tmuxai; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official homepage says TmuxAI works alongside the user in a tmux window.
source_facts.description supports AI, terminal-assistant, and tmux tags.
